S.FORM: Luke Babbitt hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw. kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 6, Luke Babbitt, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
